LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT RAMANBHAI PATEL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP SECTION 473(B)] IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF'S REASONABLE COMPENSATORY LEGAL FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN CONNECTION WITH TRIAL. PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY FOR SUCH FEES AND COSTS BY SEPARATE MOTION WITH PROPERLY SUPPORTING DECLARATION DETAILING THE RECOVERABLE FEES AND COSTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RAMANBHAI PATEL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP SECTION 473(B)].

DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF'S REASONABLE COMPENSATORY LEGAL FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN CONNECTION WITH TRIAL.
